channel.title: SPL - Ballard Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - Ballard Branch

item.title: Teen Snacks & Facts
item.description:
Monday, March 30, 2026 at 4:30 PM

Location: Ballard Branch, Meeting Room

Teens! Join us to try, rate, and learn about snacks from other countries.

Event details

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Tuesday, March 31, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Ballard Branch, Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

item.title: Genealogy Drop-In
item.description:
Tuesday, March 31, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Ballard Branch, Study Room

Free one-on-one genealogy help from the Seattle Genealogical Society

Event details

item.title: Bilingual Toddler Story Time / Hora de cuentos bilingüe para niños pequeños
item.description:
Wednesday, April 1, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Ballard Branch, Meeting Room / Sala de reuniones

At Bilingual Toddler Story Time, kids ages 1-3 and their families can enjoy songs, stories, and music.Program in English and Spanish.--------------------------------------------Durante la hora de cuentos, los niños de 1 a 3 años y sus familias pueden disfrutar de canciones, cuentos y música.Evento en inglés y español.

Event details

item.title: Weekly Movie
item.description:
Wednesday, April 1, 2026 at 1:30 PM

Location: Ballard Branch, Meeting Room

Join us for a movie and popcorn!

Event details

item.title: NAMI Seattle Drop-in
item.description:
Thursday, April 2, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Ballard Branch, Meeting Room

Join the National Alliance on Mental Illness (NAMI) of Seattle for in-person services each month.

Event details

item.title: Toddler Play Group
item.description:
Saturday, April 4, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Ballard Branch, Meeting Room

A drop-in play group for toddlers and their families.

Event details

item.title: Game On for Teens! Role-playing game (RPG)
item.description:
Monday, April 6, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: Ballard Branch, Meeting Room

Join us to play a tabletop role playing game (TTRPG).

Event details

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Tuesday, April 7, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Ballard Branch, Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

item.title: Bilingual Toddler Story Time / Hora de cuentos bilingüe para niños pequeños
item.description:
Wednesday, April 8, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Ballard Branch, Meeting Room / Sala de reuniones

At Bilingual Toddler Story Time, kids ages 1-3 and their families can enjoy songs, stories, and music.Program in English and Spanish.--------------------------------------------Durante la hora de cuentos, los niños de 1 a 3 años y sus familias pueden disfrutar de canciones, cuentos y música.Evento en inglés y español.
